title: pterostylis multiflora
intro: Pterostylis multiflora, also known as the Queensland narrow-leaved greenhood, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Pterostylis multiflora is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
